    A

    addClickLore(String) - Method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.item.ItemBuilder
    Consistent "Clic : ..." hint, for items with a single click action worth spelling out.
    addLeftRightClickLore(String, String) - Method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.item.ItemBuilder
    Consistent "Clic gauche : .../Clic droit : ..." hint, for items whose two click types do different things.

    addLore(Component...) - Method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.item.SkullBuilder
     
    agree(long, String) - Static method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils.PluralUtils
    Same as PluralUtils.agree(long, String, String), assuming a regular plural (just add an "s").
    agree(long, String, String) - Static method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils.PluralUtils
    The singular or plural form of a word, agreeing with count (plural for every count but 1 and -1).

    B

    backItem() - Static method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.menu.MenuTheme
     
    BrandUtils - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils
    Survisland's brand palette, hex-exact so it renders identically everywhere Adventure components are used (menus, chat messages, ...) instead of falling back to the nearest of the 16 legacy named colors.
    BrandUtils() - Constructor for class com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils.BrandUtils

    GameModeSelectMenu - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.menu.widget
    Generic gamemode picker applied to one or several players at once (a single player's detail page, or every member of a team).

    highlight(String) - Static method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils.MessageUtils
    A word or phrase to make stand out in an otherwise neutral sentence, in the brand's primary accent.
    highlight(String, TextColor) - Static method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils.MessageUtils
    A word or phrase to make stand out in an otherwise neutral sentence, in the given color.

    I

    isExpired(long) - Method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.skin.SkinData

    ItemBuilder - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.item
    Fluent builder for ItemStacks.

    M

    MenuTheme - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.menu
    Shared visual building blocks for SurvislandMenus: filler, navigation items, click sound.
    MessageUtils - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils
    Sends prefixed chat messages built from a mix of plain strings (rendered in the message's neutral base color) and Components (rendered as given) — use MessageUtils.highlight(String) for the one or two words that actually matter in a sentence instead of coloring the whole line, e.g.: sendSuccessMessage(player, "Il fait maintenant ", highlight("nuit", BrandUtils.SECONDARY), ".").
    MessageUtils() - Constructor for class com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils.MessageUtils
     
    MojangAPI - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.skin
     
    MojangAPI(JavaPlugin) - Constructor for class com.lwidev.survisland.api.skin.MojangAPI

    open() - Method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.menu.SurvislandMenu
    Opens this menu for its player, replacing whatever menu (if any) they currently have open.

    PlayerInventoryMenu - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.menu.player
    Live view/edit of another player's full equipment — storage, hotbar, armor and offhand — plus a read-only glance at their health/food.
    PlayerInventoryMenu(Player, Player) - Constructor for class com.lwidev.survisland.api.menu.player.PlayerInventoryMenu

    PluralUtils - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils
    French singular/plural agreement, so nobody has to hand-roll "(s)" suffixes at each call site.

    resolvePlayer(CommandContext, String) - Method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.command.SurvislandCommand
    Resolves a single-player selector argument (name or @a/@e/@p/@r/@s selector).
    resolvePlayerProfiles(CommandContext, String) - Method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.command.SurvislandCommand
    Resolves a player-profile argument (name or @a/@e/@p/@r/@s selector).
    resolvePlayers(CommandContext, String) - Method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.command.SurvislandCommand
    Resolves a multi-player selector argument (@a/@e/@r or a single name).

    S

    SECONDARY - Static variable in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils.BrandUtils
    Warm golden yellow, analogous to BrandUtils.PRIMARY on the color wheel.

    skull(String) - Static method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.item.ItemBuilder
    Decorative head variant from a raw base64 "textures" property blob (e.g.
    skull(UUID, String) - Static method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.item.ItemBuilder
    Player-head variant, resolved by owner UUID (works for offline/never-joined players too).
    SkullBuilder - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.item
    Player-head variant of ItemBuilder, built from a PlayerProfile.
    SoundUtils - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils
    Centralized sounds by intent (not by feature), so any event needing the same cue reuses it.
    SoundUtils() - Constructor for class com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils.SoundUtils
     
    subcommand(String) - Method in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.command.SurvislandCommand
    Declares a subcommand (e.g.
    Subcommand - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.command
    A subcommand of a SurvislandCommand, created via SurvislandCommand.subcommand(String).
    SurvislandCommand - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.command
    Base class for every Survisland command.
    SurvislandCommandManager - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.command
    Registers SurvislandCommands via Paper's Brigadier lifecycle API and auto-registers their (and their subcommands') permission nodes with Bukkit.
    SurvislandMenu - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.menu
    Base class for every Survisland menu (inventory GUI).
    SurvislandMenuManager - Class in com.lwidev.survisland.api.menu
    Registers the single Bukkit listener behind every SurvislandMenu and tracks each player's currently open menu plus their navigation history.

    T

    TERTIARY - Static variable in class com.lwidev.survisland.api.utils.BrandUtils
    Azure blue, BrandUtils.PRIMARY's complement (opposite hue) on the color wheel.

    W

    Same as PluralUtils.withCount(long, String, String), assuming a regular plural (just add an "s").
